digest.component_or_area: external Jira/LLM integration test tier and CI workflow
propositions: The live Jira external tests can only ever skip because the workflow provides no JIRA_* secrets and does not install the acli binary, so Jira API/SDK drift merges with no real integration signal.
Add an on.schedule trigger (cron 0 6 * * 1) to external-integration.yml and mirror reconcile-bridge.yml's Jira env wiring and acli cache/install/PATH/auth steps exactly.
Register a jira_live pytest marker and auto-apply it in conftest via a collection hook keyed on modules defining _live_jira_ready, so future Jira modules are covered without enumeration.
A pytest_sessionfinish hook fails the session when REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL is truthy and at least one jira_live test was collected but zero executed, and is a no-op when REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL is unset.
The live Jira round-trip test performs real self-cleaning mutations (create_issue twice, set_relationship, try/finally deletes), requiring a dedicated disposable Jira test project.
Tests must cover the hook behavior over constructed session reports and a config-as-artifact drift guard asserting the cron, Jira env, and acli PATH/auth wiring.
